brief_justification: Arrives at D with precise property-by-property structural mapping, fully valid; Goes three levels deep — maps each catalyst property independently, then inverts to show why alternatives fail; Proceeds linearly with no explicit naming of biases or assumption-checking mid-analysis; Falsifies all three distractors with specific structural reasons, though no boundary-condition or re-derivation check; Presents conclusions as definitive without flagging assumptions or what evidence could overturn them; Systematically addresses all three alternatives and gives distinct, specific reasons each fails the structural mapping; Every conclusion traces to an explicit derivation step that a third party could follow and reproduce without additional context.
